title: Double Edge
body:
Welcome to Double-Edge!

Have you ever looted a chest with a friend and had a hard time determining who should get a specific piece of loot? Or did you burn your highly overpowered set of armor and tools in a nether lava lake? Or do you just want a duplicate set of your highly enchanted netherite armor to put on display? Your problems have just been solved with the Splitter. For the cost of half the tool's durability and a saw, you can get a half-durability copy maintaining the original tool's enchantments, or get their materials back.
 
Feel free to use this mod in your modpacks
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/H7zomdsfxP8" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>
Version 1.0.6 will likely be the final update for this mod, Thank you for playing, The source code will be available after this update is released
